response.overview: A small village becomes chaotic and excited when Zain brings home his friend, Malaysia's most popular influencer and artist, Shafinaz, to experience her first time celebrating Ramadan in the countryside after years abroad, sparking funny and cheerful moments in their village. Zain, who has feelings for Shafinaz, tries to propose to her on Raya night.
response.title: Artis Pujaanku Mai Beraya
